overview: FocusHub is a productivity terminal engineered to orchestrate real-time system telemetry and contextual focus metrics directly from your workflow.
goals: Optimize local telemetry parsing down to sub-10ms overhead
Achieve deep integration with standard developer terminals
features: Dynamic background daemon tracker with zero CPU footprint
Cryptographically secure, localized SQLite database storing user patterns offline
Beautiful built-in Tailwind UI terminal visualizer

architecture.description: Next.js client layer with hyper-optimized state pipelines.
Rust-compiled background observer interfacing with kernel telemetry.

contributionGuide: Want to contribute? Check out our issue board for tags labeled 'good first issue'. Make sure your Rust tests pass locally (`cargo test`) before opening a PR.
